name: Onboarding WF9 — SignWell Document Signing (Drive PDF → SignWell)

parameters.formDescription: Upload a Google Drive PDF link to send for e-signature via SignWell.

nodes.name: Signing Request Form
nodes.notes: Form trigger collecting client email, client name, and a Google Drive shareable PDF link.

nodes.name: Extract File ID from URL
nodes.notes: Parses the Google Drive shareable link to extract the file ID for downloading.

nodes.name: Download PDF from Drive
nodes.notes: Downloads the PDF file from Google Drive using the extracted file ID.

nodes.name: Convert Binary to Base64
nodes.notes: Extracts the binary PDF data and converts it to base64 for the SignWell API upload.

nodes.name: Create SignWell Document
nodes.notes: Uploads the PDF to SignWell as a draft document with text tags enabled. Anthony signs first (order 1), then the client (order 2).

nodes.name: Send Document for Signing
nodes.notes: Sends the SignWell document for signing to both recipients.
